# 🔷 V49 — Working-Day Blade (Custos · Lampyra)
**vertex** · shared · knowledge

Value+Computation+Protection (stratum 3). Shared seat: Custos witnesses transparent governance, Lampyra is the Bitcoin-Lightning gemsetter. Source: Christian Saucier's Boundary Blade Cartography.
